title: Medication continuity grab sheet
summary: List medicine name, strength, schedule, reason, prescriber, pharmacy, allergies, storage needs, remaining supply, and a photo of the original label.
content: List medicine name, strength, schedule, reason, prescriber, pharmacy, allergies, storage needs, remaining supply, and a photo of the original label. Contact a pharmacist or clinician before substitution, dose change, sharing, crushing, splitting, or stopping a prescription. Do not rely on memory alone for high-risk or time-critical medicines.
materials: Notebook or printed card. Context: “Medication continuity grab sheet”.
Relevant labels, contacts, and official alerts — for «Medication continuity grab sheet»
steps: List medicine name, strength, schedule, reason, prescriber, pharmacy, allergies, storage needs, remaining supply, and a photo of the original label.
Contact a pharmacist or clinician before substitution, dose change, sharing, crushing, splitting, or stopping a prescription.
Assign one person to act and another to verify the result for Medication continuity grab sheet.
Record time, source, action, result, unresolved risk, and next review for Medication continuity grab sheet.
warnings: Do not rely on memory alone for high-risk or time-critical medicines.
Official instructions and trained responders override this offline card for Medication continuity grab sheet.
common_mistakes: Acting before location, time, hazard, and responsible person are clear for Medication continuity grab sheet.
Failing to update the plan when conditions change during Medication continuity grab sheet.
alternatives: Use a paper note, SMS, radio message, or trusted messenger when the main system is unavailable for Medication continuity grab sheet.
failure_signs: The decision source, responsible person, or next review cannot be identified for Medication continuity grab sheet.
The action creates a new hazard or delays qualified help during Medication continuity grab sheet.
when_not_to_use: Do not use this card to override an evacuation order, emergency responder, clinician, product label, or local law for Medication continuity grab sheet.
short_term: For Medication continuity grab sheet, stabilize the immediate risk, communicate the decision, and schedule the next check before attention moves elsewhere.
long_term: After Medication continuity grab sheet, update supplies, contact lists, maps, training, and the written plan from what actually happened.
if_method_fails: Stop Medication continuity grab sheet, isolate the unsafe result, communicate the failure, and use the safest official or professionally supported fallback available.
environment_notes: Adapt Medication continuity grab sheet to Greek heat, wildfire smoke, earthquakes, islands, mountain roads, apartment stairs, power cuts, water interruptions, mobility limits, and official alerts.
sources: CDC — Water, sanitation and hygiene emergencies: https://www.cdc.gov/water-emergency/index.html
